textByHash.272a9decc1418a290f7e958fe3407589345bb709: Ok, keep an eye out for the messages though!
textByHash.2ba3fa01f7b19ac0b94e945a7cc6928e5bc24315: Please enter the answer to the question.
textByHash.2d27127a382df9a274289420d5353865c38ccefa: I need you to answer this for me.
textByHash.30f9bb5bbacc1407f46f4891e1fb40919705e1b5: Do you need to turn on any warnings right now?
textByHash.30fe72b2ce016dd79b03147d13ccb3e303193ef3: If I find a dangerous area, then I put up warning signs that will tell you what is so dangerous about that area.
textByHash.41d48f865b9452274643b7a54ca2f2d9d46f50e9: How can that be? Try again!
textByHash.480dfa6d58e0115f1076e9cbbb132d4dff18fdac: There is nothing you need to do my friend! I am the Doomsayer, although my real title could be something like the Danger Tutor.
textByHash.50cdc88818fcf719a8bed50aa4597da727f8d6e5: You've dished out damage to breach monsters. Keep up the dangerous activities! Anyway...
textByHash.590295b8fb507899a4b23bdd809ff3fd0c139403: That way doom lies, I cannot comply. Your protection will be finished in less than 5 minutes.
textByHash.5c90c1a20ec05220dd3ce211a101272b39d25a8b: Are you sure? Much doom lies that way and it can not be undone!
textByHash.5f02ba8dfdce891f3e8673afae29d70d63a367cf: You got lucky this time, next time doom will be upon you.
textByHash.7bde68eaacea19bb0359a909d933e814158e993a: Yes! I roam the world sensing danger.
textByHash.8d75ab88f7f1aacb5d0e4706dd533553a31c8fce: You haven't got any PvP protection. Doom is already upon you.
textByHash.b2a51ae4f0d908fab8121bacb78bd8971e5383c3: If you see the signs often enough, then you can turn them off; by that time you likely know what the area has in store for you.
textByHash.ccc6ab50247fe08f0aa301bbef1bb29b24e159f1: If you want to see the warning messages again, I can turn them back on for you.
textByHash.ccd8413584e852de385a757ab1aeb660597ea6b7: All around us! I can feel it in the air, hear it on the wind, smell it... also in the air!
